app_store_item.display_long_description:
**Two Player Co-Op**

Two agents enter. Two agents must leave. These missions demand teamwork in the face of overwhelming odds. When threats spiral in from every direction, having a partner isn't just an advantage – it's essential. 
![{"height":720,"type":"video","width":1280}](https://scontent.oculuscdn.com/v/t64.7195-25/473393594_564651256573538_5819654525810392689_n.mp4?_nc_cat=102&ccb=1-7&_nc_sid=b20b63&_nc_ohc=qL15cH_isc4Q7kNvwG3ss9N&_nc_oc=AdqMHZlnfoHFb2Tp15opRjPwZpUvAqtuxO1l410KDelDClECHuzlc-WJjBO0xKcCr_w&_nc_zt=28&_nc_ht=scontent.oculuscdn.com&_nc_gid=lPIbtsf7JiovqktJUrnlhQ&_nc_ss=7a389&oh=00_AfwN-0w88CsdM5Pdm2baYkFRr2pA0X2STf2_m8n1doM5Mg&oe=69D0CA30)

**Time Bends. They Break.**

You're a glass cannon, lethal but fragile. One hit ends you, but they have to land it first. Snatch guns from the air, deflect bullets and stretch time into eternity so you can plot the perfect strike.
![{"height":720,"type":"video","width":1280}](https://scontent.oculuscdn.com/v/t64.7195-25/473392067_1175131450610946_4230181275092083096_n.mp4?_nc_cat=111&ccb=1-7&_nc_sid=b20b63&_nc_ohc=00fKG2HLz5sQ7kNvwHA1NWU&_nc_oc=AdqBSc2PvGR5IlFtiCcTaSkqHqqa2tSm9iBk_0mAsfglfHXYHIIR_quaqMPsMFP8vrU&_nc_zt=28&_nc_ht=scontent.oculuscdn.com&_nc_gid=lPIbtsf7JiovqktJUrnlhQ&_nc_ss=7a389&oh=00_AfxqGORh12PWDC8h0ajyOoxTSYoroL-ogAoJ-_UWQJd3Fw&oe=69D0D8BC)

**Cognitive Disobedience**

It’s 2135 and Nuragen’s ChronOS has transformed the world, enabling humans to digitize memories and live forever. What began as a company has become an empire that holds humanity's throat in an iron grip. 

As a Chronostrike Agent, you must defend this priceless data using your ultimate weapon: the power to manipulate time. Along the way, you’ll uncover dark truths buried deep in the labyrinth of human consciousness.
![{"height":720,"type":"video","width":1280}](https://scontent.oculuscdn.com/v/t64.7195-25/473393511_936479561969629_5118998181247958197_n.mp4?_nc_cat=105&ccb=1-7&_nc_sid=b20b63&_nc_ohc=CCeZtbf0gH0Q7kNvwEmrOLx&_nc_oc=AdopjE1IUUpfEucBx9ORC3KjAwx07piX-bgHtFD27IgyoLdTs7weIA9r7KI0qe6pL3Y&_nc_zt=28&_nc_ht=scontent.oculuscdn.com&_nc_gid=lPIbtsf7JiovqktJUrnlhQ&_nc_ss=7a389&oh=00_Afy1_3IgnDXo1g3i-FTCjSECIh17qESU_WlQ3UGuQSz_QQ&oe=69D0D5B0)

**Learn or Get Burned**

Each reboot is a lesson. Watch as muscle memory takes over, transforming impossible odds into an elegant dance. Don't follow your enemies – lead them straight into your crosshairs.
![{"height":720,"type":"video","width":1280}](https://scontent.oculuscdn.com/v/t64.7195-25/473391760_1823824125019921_4958953774479287021_n.mp4?_nc_cat=105&ccb=1-7&_nc_sid=b20b63&_nc_ohc=QYlOLhRmwtkQ7kNvwEtwpRx&_nc_oc=AdpkHgt05dL8bcluMjA_aDO34XhaqX5M9v1DsRCCXi5hTwiRWMojcQUXh9SMrZ4IheE&_nc_zt=28&_nc_ht=scontent.oculuscdn.com&_nc_gid=lPIbtsf7JiovqktJUrnlhQ&_nc_ss=7a389&oh=00_Afwk3R3S9VdETamIzmWgMCm2Cl1RqgU1FaE5laDmcj5_EA&oe=69D0CB0E)

**Master the Mayhem**

You’re always outnumbered, but time is on your side. Stand still, and the world stops, move, and the clock resumes. Your body is the controller. Think fast, move faster, and let intuition guide you. Your directive is clear, the human mind isn’t.
![{"height":720,"type":"video","width":1280}](https://scontent.oculuscdn.com/v/t64.7195-25/473391896_538883642529444_2351716809413594628_n.mp4?_nc_cat=108&ccb=1-7&_nc_sid=b20b63&_nc_ohc=R14wYP5pOJwQ7kNvwEXbQTE&_nc_oc=AdrkuXMTnLzsyiqLm6QEjvsmR8Vj4gH94GCl9LNL8i7hhdBan92ZCx3pbcgXw3mYnC8&_nc_zt=28&_nc_ht=scontent.oculuscdn.com&_nc_gid=lPIbtsf7JiovqktJUrnlhQ&_nc_ss=7a389&oh=00_AfyxBU9aoROeSR3srazU3XPam4I8j-o50wZe7dhisrGl0w&oe=69D0CF57)

node.review_description: I bought this primarily for the co-op and it's truly fantastic. Think Superhot but with a slight puzzle element in how you need to co-ordinate. My only complaint is that I wish there was more. If the devs brought out a pack with more co-op segments, I would buy it in a heartbeat.

Atmosphere and execution of the concept are top notch for the price.  I bought this thinking of co-op Superhot, which it does a great job of, but the experience is very short.  Single player has more content and is also very enjoyable, but I wish they had focused exclusively on co-op as it is a tense and hilarious experience trying to coordinate to pass each level with a friend.  It's like a blend of Portal 2 co-op and Superhot, but is uniquely it's own thing.  Please add more co-op levels!
Epic experience, just needs Quest Achievements!!
i just get stuck on looking for network every time i try it,

Just bought it and tried to played with my friend. 
Tutorial was ok (did not play single player though).
However upon starting multiplayer game, first problem appeared: I was about 3m under the floor, solved by restarting and redrawing roomscale, never needed before. 
When we started to play the game, I immediately noticed something is off, just some examples:
Enemies hitboxes, sometimes hit works, sometimes not. Looks like sync issue. Game breaking bug when you start with few bullets, making game unplayable (or unwinnable). More and more such bugs appears, like knife you throw is going off way, disappearing suddenly, or just bounce off enemy. A chopper we met during gameplay had turret. However the turret fly independently from chopper. First time chopper even did not appear, so imagine turret flying in air shooting at you. 
I cant recommend to buy this game at this stage. I will request refund.
node.review_title: Software in alpha version at most.
